	require.NoError(t, os.WriteFile(testFile, []byte("test content"), 0644))
	
	req := httptest.NewRequest("GET", "/api/files/test.txt", nil)
	req.Header.Set("Authorization", "Bearer "+generateValidTestJWT(t))
	w := httptest.NewRecorder()
	
	server.engine.ServeHTTP(w, req)
	
	assert.Equal(t, http.StatusOK, w.Code)
	assert.Equal(t, "test content", w.Body.String())
	assert.Equal(t, "File Transfer", w.Header().Get("Content-Description"))
	assert.Equal(t, "binary", w.Header().Get("Content-Transfer-Encoding"))
	assert.Contains(t, w.Header().Get("Content-Disposition"), "test.txt")
}

func TestDownloadFileEscapesWorkspace(t *testing.T) {
	gin.SetMode(gin.TestMode)
	
	tempDir := t.TempDir()
	config := &Config{
		Port:      8080,
		Workspace: tempDir,
	}

func TestSanitizePath(t *testing.T) {
	tests := []struct {
		name        string
		workspace   string
		input       string
		expectError bool
	}{
		{
			name:      "valid relative path",
			workspace: "/tmp/workspace",
			input:     "subdir/file.txt",
		},
		{
			name:      "valid nested path",
			workspace: "/tmp/workspace",
			input:     "a/b/c/d/file.txt",
		},
		{
			name:        "path escape with ..",
			workspace:   "/tmp/workspace",
			input:       "../etc/passwd",
			expectError: true,
		},
		{
			name:        "absolute path escape",
			workspace:   "/tmp/workspace",
			input:       "/etc/passwd",
			expectError: true,
		},
	}
	
	for _, tt := range tests {
		t.Run(tt.name, func(t *testing.T) {
			workspace, err := filepath.Abs(tt.workspace)
			require.NoError(t, err)
			
			config := &Config{
				Port:      8080,
				Workspace: workspace,
			}
			
			server, err := NewServer(config)
			require.NoError(t, err)
			
			result, err := server.sanitizePath(tt.input)
			
			if tt.expectError {
				assert.Error(t, err)
			} else {
				assert.NoError(t, err)
				assert.True(t, strings.HasPrefix(result, workspace))
			}
		})
	}
}

func generateValidTestJWT(t *testing.T) string {
	t.Helper()
	
 privateKey, err := generateTestRSAKey()
 require.NoError(t, err)
 
 token := jwt.NewWithClaims(jwt.SigningMethodRS256, jwt.MapClaims{
	 "sub": "test",
	 "iat": time.Now().Unix(),
	 "exp": time.Now().Add(time.Hour).Unix(),
 })
 
 tokenString, err := token.SignedString(privateKey)
 require.NoError(t, err)
 
 publicKey, err := generateTestPublicKeyFromPrivate(privateKey)
 require.NoError(t, err)
 
 os.Setenv("PICOD_AUTH_PUBLIC_KEY", publicKey)
 
 return tokenString
}

func generateTestRSAKey() (*rsa.PrivateKey, error) {
	return rsa.GenerateKey(rand.Reader, 2048)
}

func generateTestPublicKeyFromPrivate(privateKey *rsa.PrivateKey) (string, error) {
	publicKeyBytes, err := x509.MarshalPKIXPublicKey(&privateKey.PublicKey)
	if err != nil {
		return "", err
	}
 
	publicKeyPEM := pem.EncodeToMemory(&pem.Block{
		Type:  "PUBLIC KEY",
		Bytes: publicKeyBytes,
	})
 
	return string(publicKeyPEM), nil
}

func TestHealthEndpoint(t *testing.T) {
	gin.SetMode(gin.TestMode)

	config := &Config{
		Port:      8080,
		Workspace: t.TempDir(),
	}

	require.NoError(t, err)

	req := httptest.NewRequest("GET", "/health", nil)
	w := httptest.NewRecorder()

	server.engine.ServeHTTP(w, req)

	assert.Equal(t, http.StatusOK, w.Code)

	var response map[string]interface{}
	err = json.Unmarshal(w.Body.Bytes(), &response)
	require.NoError(t, err)

	assert.Equal(t, "ok", response["status"])
	assert.Equal(t, "PicoD", response["service"])
	assert.Equal(t, "0.0.1", response["version"])
	assert.NotEmpty(t, response["uptime"])
}

func TestExecuteCommandValidRequest(t *testing.T) {

	}

}

func TestUploadFileMultipart(t *testing.T) {
	gin.SetMode(gin.TestMode)

	tempDir := t.TempDir()
	config := &Config{
		Port:      8080,
		Workspace: tempDir,
	}

	server, err := NewServer(config)
	require.NoError(t, err)

	body := &bytes.Buffer{}
	writer := multipart.NewWriter(body)

	part, err := writer.CreateFormFile("file", "test.txt")
	require.NoError(t, err)

	_, err = part.Write([]byte("test content"))
	require.NoError(t, err)

	writer.WriteField("path", "uploads/test.txt")
	writer.WriteField("mode", "0644")
	writer.Close()

	req := httptest.NewRequest("POST", "/api/files", body)
	req.Header.Set("Content-Type", writer.FormDataContentType())
	req.Header.Set("Authorization", "Bearer "+generateValidTestJWT(t))
	w := httptest.NewRecorder()

	server.engine.ServeHTTP(w, req)

	assert.Equal(t, http.StatusOK, w.Code)

	var response FileInfo
	err = json.Unmarshal(w.Body.Bytes(), &response)
	require.NoError(t, err)

	assert.Equal(t, "uploads/test.txt", response.Path)
	assert.Equal(t, int64(12), response.Size)
	assert.Equal(t, "0644", response.Mode)

	filePath := filepath.Join(tempDir, "uploads", "test.txt")
	content, err := os.ReadFile(filePath)
	require.NoError(t, err)
	assert.Equal(t, "test content", string(content))
}

func TestSanitizePath(t *testing.T) {
	tests := []struct {
		name        string
		workspace   string
		input       string
		expectError bool
	}{
		{
			name:      "valid relative path",
			workspace: "/tmp/workspace",
			input:     "subdir/file.txt",
		},
		{
			name:      "valid nested path",
			workspace: "/tmp/workspace",
			input:     "a/b/c/d/file.txt",
		},
		{
			name:        "path escape with ..",
			workspace:   "/tmp/workspace",
			input:       "../etc/passwd",
			expectError: true,
		},
		{
			name:        "absolute path escape",
			workspace:   "/tmp/workspace",
			input:       "/etc/passwd",
			expectError: true,
		},
	}

	for _, tt := range tests {
		t.Run(tt.name, func(t *testing.T) {
			workspace, err := filepath.Abs(tt.workspace)
			require.NoError(t, err)

			config := &Config{
				Port:      8080,
				Workspace: workspace,
			}

			server, err := NewServer(config)
			require.NoError(t, err)

			result, err := server.sanitizePath(tt.input)

			if tt.expectError {
				assert.Error(t, err)
			} else {
				assert.NoError(t, err)
				assert.True(t, strings.HasPrefix(result, workspace))
			}
		})
	}
}

func generateValidTestJWT(t *testing.T) string {
	t.Helper()

	privateKey, err := generateTestRSAKey()
	require.NoError(t, err)

	token := jwt.NewWithClaims(jwt.SigningMethodRS256, jwt.MapClaims{
		"sub": "test",
		"iat": time.Now().Unix(),
		"exp": time.Now().Add(time.Hour).Unix(),
	})

	tokenString, err := token.SignedString(privateKey)
	require.NoError(t, err)

	publicKey, err := generateTestPublicKeyFromPrivate(privateKey)
	require.NoError(t, err)

	os.Setenv("PICOD_AUTH_PUBLIC_KEY", publicKey)

	return tokenString
}

func generateTestRSAKey() (*rsa.PrivateKey, error) {
	return rsa.GenerateKey(rand.Reader, 2048)
}

func generateTestPublicKeyFromPrivate(privateKey *rsa.PrivateKey) (string, error) {
	publicKeyBytes, err := x509.MarshalPKIXPublicKey(&privateKey.PublicKey)
	if err != nil {
		return "", err
	}

	publicKeyPEM := pem.EncodeToMemory(&pem.Block{
		Type:  "PUBLIC KEY",
		Bytes: publicKeyBytes,
	})

	return string(publicKeyPEM), nil
}

func TestUploadFileMultipart(t *testing.T) {

		Port:      8080,
		Workspace: tempDir,
	}

	part, err := writer.CreateFormFile("file", "test.txt")
	require.NoError(t, err)

	_, err = part.Write([]byte("test content"))
	require.NoError(t, err)

	writer.WriteField("path", "uploads/test.txt")
	writer.WriteField("mode", "0644")
	writer.Close()

	req := httptest.NewRequest("POST", "/api/files", body)
	req.Header.Set("Content-Type", writer.FormDataContentType())
	req.Header.Set("Authorization", "Bearer "+generateValidTestJWT(t))
	w := httptest.NewRecorder()

	server.engine.ServeHTTP(w, req)

	assert.Equal(t, http.StatusOK, w.Code)

	var response FileInfo
	err = json.Unmarshal(w.Body.Bytes(), &response)
	require.NoError(t, err)

	assert.Equal(t, "uploads/test.txt", response.Path)
	assert.Equal(t, int64(12), response.Size)
	assert.Equal(t, "0644", response.Mode)

	filePath := filepath.Join(tempDir, "uploads", "test.txt")
	content, err := os.ReadFile(filePath)
	require.NoError(t, err)
	assert.Equal(t, "test content", string(content))
}

func TestSanitizePath(t *testing.T) {
	tests := []struct {
		name        string
		workspace   string
		input       string
		expectError bool
	}{
		{
			name:      "valid relative path",
			workspace: "/tmp/workspace",
			input:     "subdir/file.txt",
		},
		{
			name:      "valid nested path",
			workspace: "/tmp/workspace",
			input:     "a/b/c/d/file.txt",
		},
		{
			name:        "path escape with ..",
			workspace:   "/tmp/workspace",
			input:       "../etc/passwd",
			expectError: true,
		},
		{
			name:        "absolute path escape",
			workspace:   "/tmp/workspace",
			input:       "/etc/passwd",
			expectError: true,
		},
	}

	for _, tt := range tests {
		t.Run(tt.name, func(t *testing.T) {
			workspace, err := filepath.Abs(tt.workspace)
			require.NoError(t, err)

			config := &Config{
				Port:      8080,
				Workspace: workspace,
			}

			server, err := NewServer(config)
			require.NoError(t, err)

			result, err := server.sanitizePath(tt.input)

			if tt.expectError {
				assert.Error(t, err)
			} else {
				assert.NoError(t, err)
				assert.True(t, strings.HasPrefix(result, workspace))
			}
		})
	}
}

func generateValidTestJWT(t *testing.T) string {
	t.Helper()

	privateKey, err := generateTestRSAKey()
	require.NoError(t, err)

	token := jwt.NewWithClaims(jwt.SigningMethodRS256, jwt.MapClaims{
		"sub": "test",
		"iat": time.Now().Unix(),
		"exp": time.Now().Add(time.Hour).Unix(),
	})

	tokenString, err := token.SignedString(privateKey)
	require.NoError(t, err)

	publicKey, err := generateTestPublicKeyFromPrivate(privateKey)
	require.NoError(t, err)

	os.Setenv("PICOD_AUTH_PUBLIC_KEY", publicKey)

	return tokenString
}

func generateTestRSAKey() (*rsa.PrivateKey, error) {
	return rsa.GenerateKey(rand.Reader, 2048)
}

func generateTestPublicKeyFromPrivate(privateKey *rsa.PrivateKey) (string, error) {
	publicKeyBytes, err := x509.MarshalPKIXPublicKey(&privateKey.PublicKey)
	if err != nil {
		return "", err
	}

	publicKeyPEM := pem.EncodeToMemory(&pem.Block{
		Type:  "PUBLIC KEY",
		Bytes: publicKeyBytes,
	})

	return string(publicKeyPEM), nil
}

	}

	writer.WriteField("path", "uploads/test.txt")
	writer.WriteField("mode", "0644")
	writer.Close()

	req := httptest.NewRequest("POST", "/api/files", body)

	require.NoError(t, err)

	assert.Equal(t, "uploads/test.txt", response.Path)
	assert.Equal(t, int64(12), response.Size)
	assert.Equal(t, "0644", response.Mode)

	filePath := filepath.Join(tempDir, "uploads", "test.txt")
	content, err := os.ReadFile(filePath)
	require.NoError(t, err)
	assert.Equal(t, "test content", string(content))

func TestSanitizePath(t *testing.T) {
	tests := []struct {
		name        string
		workspace   string
		input       string
		expectError bool
	}{
		{
			name:      "valid relative path",
			workspace: "/tmp/workspace",
			input:     "subdir/file.txt",
		},
		{
			name:      "valid nested path",
			workspace: "/tmp/workspace",
			input:     "a/b/c/d/file.txt",
		},
		{
			name:        "path escape with ..",
			workspace:   "/tmp/workspace",
			input:       "../etc/passwd",
			expectError: true,
		},
		{
			name:        "absolute path escape",
			workspace:   "/tmp/workspace",
			input:       "/etc/passwd",
			expectError: true,
		},
	}

	for _, tt := range tests {
		t.Run(tt.name, func(t *testing.T) {
			workspace, err := filepath.Abs(tt.workspace)
			require.NoError(t, err)

			config := &Config{
				Port:      8080,
				Workspace: workspace,
			}

			server, err := NewServer(config)
			require.NoError(t, err)

			result, err := server.sanitizePath(tt.input)

			if tt.expectError {
				assert.Error(t, err)
			} else {
				assert.NoError(t, err)
				assert.True(t, strings.HasPrefix(result, workspace))
			}
		})
	}
}

func generateValidTestJWT(t *testing.T) string {
	t.Helper()

	privateKey, err := generateTestRSAKey()
	require.NoError(t, err)

	token := jwt.NewWithClaims(jwt.SigningMethodRS256, jwt.MapClaims{
		"sub": "test",
		"iat": time.Now().Unix(),
		"exp": time.Now().Add(time.Hour).Unix(),
	})

	tokenString, err := token.SignedString(privateKey)
	require.NoError(t, err)

	publicKey, err := generateTestPublicKeyFromPrivate(privateKey)
	require.NoError(t, err)

	os.Setenv("PICOD_AUTH_PUBLIC_KEY", publicKey)

	return tokenString
}

func generateTestRSAKey() (*rsa.PrivateKey, error) {
	return rsa.GenerateKey(rand.Reader, 2048)
}

func generateTestPublicKeyFromPrivate(privateKey *rsa.PrivateKey) (string, error) {
	publicKeyBytes, err := x509.MarshalPKIXPublicKey(&privateKey.PublicKey)
	if err != nil {
		return "", err
	}

	publicKeyPEM := pem.EncodeToMemory(&pem.Block{
		Type:  "PUBLIC KEY",
		Bytes: publicKeyBytes,
	})

	return string(publicKeyPEM), nil
}

func TestSanitizePath(t *testing.T) {
	tests := []struct {
		name        string
		workspace   string
		input       string
		expectError bool
	}{
		{
			name:      "valid relative path",
			workspace: "/tmp/workspace",
			input:     "subdir/file.txt",
		},
		{
			name:      "valid nested path",
			workspace: "/tmp/workspace",
			input:     "a/b/c/d/file.txt",
		},
		{
			name:        "path escape with ..",
			workspace:   "/tmp/workspace",
			input:       "../etc/passwd",
			expectError: true,
		},
		{
			name:        "absolute path escape",
			workspace:   "/tmp/workspace",
			input:       "/etc/passwd",
			expectError: true,
		},
	}

	for _, tt := range tests {
		t.Run(tt.name, func(t *testing.T) {
			workspace, err := filepath.Abs(tt.workspace)
			require.NoError(t, err)

			config := &Config{
				Port:      8080,
				Workspace: workspace,
			}

			server, err := NewServer(config)
			require.NoError(t, err)

			result, err := server.sanitizePath(tt.input)

			if tt.expectError {
				assert.Error(t, err)
			} else {
				assert.NoError(t, err)
				assert.True(t, strings.HasPrefix(result, workspace))
			}
		})
	}
}

func generateValidTestJWT(t *testing.T) string {
	t.Helper()

	privateKey, err := generateTestRSAKey()
	require.NoError(t, err)

	token := jwt.NewWithClaims(jwt.SigningMethodRS256, jwt.MapClaims{
		"sub": "test",
		"iat": time.Now().Unix(),
		"exp": time.Now().Add(time.Hour).Unix(),
	})

	tokenString, err := token.SignedString(privateKey)
	require.NoError(t, err)

	publicKey, err := generateTestPublicKeyFromPrivate(privateKey)
	require.NoError(t, err)

	os.Setenv("PICOD_AUTH_PUBLIC_KEY", publicKey)

	return tokenString
}

func generateTestRSAKey() (*rsa.PrivateKey, error) {
	return rsa.GenerateKey(rand.Reader, 2048)
}

func generateTestPublicKeyFromPrivate(privateKey *rsa.PrivateKey) (string, error) {
	publicKeyBytes, err := x509.MarshalPKIXPublicKey(&privateKey.PublicKey)
	if err != nil {
		return "", err
	}

	publicKeyPEM := pem.EncodeToMemory(&pem.Block{
		Type:  "PUBLIC KEY",
		Bytes: publicKeyBytes,
	})

	return string(publicKeyPEM), nil
}

func TestSanitizePath(t *testing.T) {
	tests := []struct {
		name        string
		workspace   string
		input       string
		expectError bool
	}{
		{
			name:      "valid relative path",
			workspace: "/tmp/workspace",
			input:     "subdir/file.txt",
		},
		{
			name:      "valid nested path",
			workspace: "/tmp/workspace",
			input:     "a/b/c/d/file.txt",
		},
		{
			name:        "path escape with ..",
			workspace:   "/tmp/workspace",
			input:       "../etc/passwd",
			expectError: true,
		},
		{
			name:        "absolute path escape",
			workspace:   "/tmp/workspace",
			input:       "/etc/passwd",
			expectError: true,
		},
	}

	for _, tt := range tests {
		t.Run(tt.name, func(t *testing.T) {
			workspace, err := filepath.Abs(tt.workspace)
			require.NoError(t, err)

			config := &Config{
				Port:      8080,
				Workspace: workspace,
			}

			server, err := NewServer(config)
			require.NoError(t, err)

			result, err := server.sanitizePath(tt.input)

			if tt.expectError {
				assert.Error(t, err)
			} else {
				assert.NoError(t, err)
				assert.True(t, strings.HasPrefix(result, workspace))
			}
		})
	}
}

func generateValidTestJWT(t *testing.T) string {
	t.Helper()

	privateKey, err := generateTestRSAKey()
	require.NoError(t, err)

	token := jwt.NewWithClaims(jwt.SigningMethodRS256, jwt.MapClaims{
		"sub": "test",
		"iat": time.Now().Unix(),
		"exp": time.Now().Add(time.Hour).Unix(),
	})

	tokenString, err := token.SignedString(privateKey)
	require.NoError(t, err)

	publicKey, err := generateTestPublicKeyFromPrivate(privateKey)
	require.NoError(t, err)

	os.Setenv("PICOD_AUTH_PUBLIC_KEY", publicKey)

	return tokenString
}

func generateTestRSAKey() (*rsa.PrivateKey, error) {
	return rsa.GenerateKey(rand.Reader, 2048)
}

func generateTestPublicKeyFromPrivate(privateKey *rsa.PrivateKey) (string, error) {
	publicKeyBytes, err := x509.MarshalPKIXPublicKey(&privateKey.PublicKey)
	if err != nil {
		return "", err
	}

	publicKeyPEM := pem.EncodeToMemory(&pem.Block{
		Type:  "PUBLIC KEY",
		Bytes: publicKeyBytes,
	})

	return string(publicKeyPEM), nil
}

func TestUploadFileMultipart(t *testing.T) {

	}

	body := &bytes.Buffer{}
	writer := multipart.NewWriter(body)

	part, err := writer.CreateFormFile("file", "test.txt")
	require.NoError(t, err)

	_, err = part.Write([]byte("test content"))
	require.NoError(t, err)

	writer.WriteField("path", "uploads/test.txt")
	writer.WriteField("mode", "0644")
	writer.Close()

	req := httptest.NewRequest("POST", "/api/files", body)
	req.Header.Set("Content-Type", writer.FormDataContentType())
	req.Header.Set("Authorization", "Bearer "+generateValidTestJWT(t))

	server.engine.ServeHTTP(w, req)

	assert.Equal(t, http.StatusOK, w.Code)

	err = json.Unmarshal(w.Body.Bytes(), &response)
	require.NoError(t, err)

	assert.Equal(t, "uploads/test.txt", response.Path)
	assert.Equal(t, int64(12), response.Size)
	assert.Equal(t, "0644", response.Mode)

	filePath := filepath.Join(tempDir, "uploads", "test.txt")
	content, err := os.ReadFile(filePath)
	require.NoError(t, err)
	assert.Equal(t, "test content", string(content))
}

		},
		{
			name:      "valid nested path",
			workspace: "/tmp/workspace",
			input:     "a/b/c/d/file.txt",
		},
		{
			name:        "path escape with ..",
			workspace:   "/tmp/workspace",
			input:       "../etc/passwd",
			expectError: true,
		},
		{
			name:        "absolute path escape",
			workspace:   "/tmp/workspace",
			input:       "/etc/passwd",
			expectError: true,
		},
	}

	for _, tt := range tests {
		t.Run(tt.name, func(t *testing.T) {
			workspace, err := filepath.Abs(tt.workspace)
			require.NoError(t, err)

			config := &Config{
				Port:      8080,
				Workspace: workspace,
			}

			server, err := NewServer(config)
			require.NoError(t, err)

			result, err := server.sanitizePath(tt.input)

			if tt.expectError {
				assert.Error(t, err)
			} else {
				assert.NoError(t, err)
				assert.True(t, strings.HasPrefix(result, workspace))
			}
		})
	}
}

func generateValidTestJWT(t *testing.T) string {
	t.Helper()

	privateKey, err := generateTestRSAKey()
	require.NoError(t, err)

	token := jwt.NewWithClaims(jwt.SigningMethodRS256, jwt.MapClaims{
		"sub": "test",
		"iat": time.Now().Unix(),
		"exp": time.Now().Add(time.Hour).Unix(),
	})

	tokenString, err := token.SignedString(privateKey)
	require.NoError(t, err)

	publicKey, err := generateTestPublicKeyFromPrivate(privateKey)
	require.NoError(t, err)

	os.Setenv("PICOD_AUTH_PUBLIC_KEY", publicKey)

	return tokenString
}

func generateTestRSAKey() (*rsa.PrivateKey, error) {
	return rsa.GenerateKey(rand.Reader, 2048)
}

func generateTestPublicKeyFromPrivate(privateKey *rsa.PrivateKey) (string, error) {
	publicKeyBytes, err := x509.MarshalPKIXPublicKey(&privateKey.PublicKey)
	if err != nil {
		return "", err
	}

	publicKeyPEM := pem.EncodeToMemory(&pem.Block{
		Type:  "PUBLIC KEY",
		Bytes: publicKeyBytes,
	})

	return string(publicKeyPEM), nil
}

func TestHealthEndpoint(t *testing.T) {
	gin.SetMode(gin.TestMode)

	config := &Config{
		Port:      8080,
		Workspace: t.TempDir(),
	}

	server, err := NewServer(config)
	require.NoError(t, err)

	req := httptest.NewRequest("GET", "/health", nil)
	w := httptest.NewRecorder()

	server.engine.ServeHTTP(w, req)

	assert.Equal(t, http.StatusOK, w.Code)

	var response map[string]interface{}
	err = json.Unmarshal(w.Body.Bytes(), &response)
	require.NoError(t, err)

	assert.Equal(t, "ok", response["status"])
	assert.Equal(t, "PicoD", response["service"])
	assert.Equal(t, "0.0.1", response["version"])
	assert.NotEmpty(t, response["uptime"])
}

func TestExecuteCommandValidRequest(t *testing.T) {
	gin.SetMode(gin.TestMode)

		Port:      8080,
		Workspace: tempDir,
	}

	server, err := NewServer(config)
	require.NoError(t, err)

	reqBody := ExecuteRequest{
		Command: []string{"echo", "hello world"},
	}

	body, _ := json.Marshal(reqBody)
	req := httptest.NewRequest("POST", "/api/execute", bytes.NewReader(body))
	req.Header.Set("Authorization", "Bearer "+generateValidTestJWT(t))
	w := httptest.NewRecorder()

	server.engine.ServeHTTP(w, req)

	assert.Equal(t, http.StatusOK, w.Code)

	var response ExecuteResponse
	err = json.Unmarshal(w.Body.Bytes(), &response)
	require.NoError(t, err)

	assert.Equal(t, "hello world\n", response.Stdout)
	assert.Equal(t, "", response.Stderr)
	assert.Equal(t, 0, response.ExitCode)
	assert.Greater(t, response.Duration, float64(0))
	assert.False(t, response.StartTime.IsZero())
	assert.False(t, response.EndTime.IsZero())
}

func TestUploadFileMultipart(t *testing.T) {
	gin.SetMode(gin.TestMode)

	tempDir := t.TempDir()
	config := &Config{
		Port:      8080,
		Workspace: tempDir,
	}

	server, err := NewServer(config)
	require.NoError(t, err)

	body := &bytes.Buffer{}
	writer := multipart.NewWriter(body)

	part, err := writer.CreateFormFile("file", "test.txt")
	require.NoError(t, err)

	_, err = part.Write([]byte("test content"))
	require.NoError(t, err)

	writer.WriteField("path", "uploads/test.txt")
	writer.WriteField("mode", "0644")
	writer.Close()

	req := httptest.NewRequest("POST", "/api/files", body)
	req.Header.Set("Content-Type", writer.FormDataContentType())
	req.Header.Set("Authorization", "Bearer "+generateValidTestJWT(t))
	w := httptest.NewRecorder()

	server.engine.ServeHTTP(w, req)

	assert.Equal(t, http.StatusOK, w.Code)

	var response FileInfo
	err = json.Unmarshal(w.Body.Bytes(), &response)
	require.NoError(t, err)

	assert.Equal(t, "uploads/test.txt", response.Path)
	assert.Equal(t, int64(12), response.Size)
	assert.Equal(t, "0644", response.Mode)

	filePath := filepath.Join(tempDir, "uploads", "test.txt")
	content, err := os.ReadFile(filePath)
	require.NoError(t, err)
	assert.Equal(t, "test content", string(content))
}

func TestSanitizePath(t *testing.T) {
	tests := []struct {
		name        string
		workspace   string
		input       string
		expectError bool
	}{
		{
			name:      "valid relative path",
			workspace: "/tmp/workspace",
			input:     "subdir/file.txt",
		},
		{
			name:      "valid nested path",
			workspace: "/tmp/workspace",
			input:     "a/b/c/d/file.txt",
		},
		{
			name:        "path escape with ..",
			workspace:   "/tmp/workspace",
			input:       "../etc/passwd",
			expectError: true,
		},
		{
			name:        "absolute path escape",
			workspace:   "/tmp/workspace",
			input:       "/etc/passwd",
			expectError: true,
		},
	}

	for _, tt := range tests {
		t.Run(tt.name, func(t *testing.T) {
			workspace, err := filepath.Abs(tt.workspace)
			require.NoError(t, err)

			config := &Config{
				Port:      8080,
				Workspace: workspace,
			}

			server, err := NewServer(config)
			require.NoError(t, err)

			result, err := server.sanitizePath(tt.input)

			if tt.expectError {
				assert.Error(t, err)
			} else {
				assert.NoError(t, err)
				assert.True(t, strings.HasPrefix(result, workspace))
			}
		})
	}
}

func generateValidTestJWT(t *testing.T) string {
	t.Helper()

	privateKey, err := generateTestRSAKey()
	require.NoError(t, err)

	token := jwt.NewWithClaims(jwt.SigningMethodRS256, jwt.MapClaims{
		"sub": "test",
		"iat": time.Now().Unix(),
		"exp": time.Now().Add(time.Hour).Unix(),
	})

	tokenString, err := token.SignedString(privateKey)
	require.NoError(t, err)

	publicKey, err := generateTestPublicKeyFromPrivate(privateKey)
	require.NoError(t, err)

	os.Setenv("PICOD_AUTH_PUBLIC_KEY", publicKey)

	return tokenString
}

func generateTestRSAKey() (*rsa.PrivateKey, error) {
	return rsa.GenerateKey(rand.Reader, 2048)
}

func generateTestPublicKeyFromPrivate(privateKey *rsa.PrivateKey) (string, error) {
	publicKeyBytes, err := x509.MarshalPKIXPublicKey(&privateKey.PublicKey)
	if err != nil {
		return "", err
	}

	publicKeyPEM := pem.EncodeToMemory(&pem.Block{
		Type:  "PUBLIC KEY",
		Bytes: publicKeyBytes,
	})

	return string(publicKeyPEM), nil
}

func TestUploadFileMultipart(t *testing.T) {

		Workspace: tempDir,
	}

	server, err := NewServer(config)
	require.NoError(t, err)

	body := &bytes.Buffer{}
	writer := multipart.NewWriter(body)

	part, err := writer.CreateFormFile("file", "test.txt")
	require.NoError(t, err)

	_, err = part.Write([]byte("test content"))
	require.NoError(t, err)

	writer.WriteField("path", "uploads/test.txt")
	writer.WriteField("mode", "0644")
	writer.Close()

	req := httptest.NewRequest("POST", "/api/files", body)
	req.Header.Set("Content-Type", writer.FormDataContentType())
	req.Header.Set("Authorization", "Bearer "+generateValidTestJWT(t))
	w := httptest.NewRecorder()

	server.engine.ServeHTTP(w, req)

	assert.Equal(t, http.StatusOK, w.Code)

	var response FileInfo
	err = json.Unmarshal(w.Body.Bytes(), &response)
	require.NoError(t, err)

	assert.Equal(t, "uploads/test.txt", response.Path)
	assert.Equal(t, int64(12), response.Size)
	assert.Equal(t, "0644", response.Mode)

	filePath := filepath.Join(tempDir, "uploads", "test.txt")
	content, err := os.ReadFile(filePath)
	require.NoError(t, err)
	assert.Equal(t, "test content", string(content))
}

package picod

import (

func TestHealthEndpoint(t *testing.T) {
	gin.SetMode(gin.TestMode)

	config := &Config{
		Port:      8080,
		Workspace: t.TempDir(),
	}

	server, err := NewServer(config)
	require.NoError(t, err)

	req := httptest.NewRequest("GET", "/health", nil)
	w := httptest.NewRecorder()

	server.engine.ServeHTTP(w, req)

	assert.Equal(t, http.StatusOK, w.Code)

	var response map[string]interface{}
	err = json.Unmarshal(w.Body.Bytes(), &response)
	require.NoError(t, err)

	assert.Equal(t, "ok", response["status"])
	assert.Equal(t, "PicoD", response["service"])
	assert.Equal(t, "0.0.1", response["version"])
	assert.NotEmpty(t, response["uptime"])
}

func TestExecuteCommandValidRequest(t *testing.T) {
	gin.SetMode(gin.TestMode)

	tempDir := t.TempDir()
	config := &Config{
		Port:      8080,
		Workspace: tempDir,
	}

	server, err := NewServer(config)
	require.NoError(t, err)

	reqBody := ExecuteRequest{
		Command: []string{"echo", "hello world"},
	}

	body, _ := json.Marshal(reqBody)
	req := httptest.NewRequest("POST", "/api/execute", bytes.NewReader(body))
	req.Header.Set("Authorization", "Bearer "+generateValidTestJWT(t))
	w := httptest.NewRecorder()

	server.engine.ServeHTTP(w, req)

	assert.Equal(t, http.StatusOK, w.Code)

	var response ExecuteResponse
	err = json.Unmarshal(w.Body.Bytes(), &response)
	require.NoError(t, err)

	assert.Equal(t, "hello world\n", response.Stdout)
	assert.Equal(t, "", response.Stderr)
	assert.Equal(t, 0, response.ExitCode)
	assert.Greater(t, response.Duration, float64(0))
	assert.False(t, response.StartTime.IsZero())
	assert.False(t, response.EndTime.IsZero())
}

func TestExecuteCommandEmptyCommand(t *testing.T) {
	gin.SetMode(gin.TestMode)

	tempDir := t.TempDir()
	config := &Config{
		Port:      8080,
		Workspace: tempDir,
	}

	server, err := NewServer(config)
	require.NoError(t, err)

	reqBody := ExecuteRequest{
		Command: []string{},
	}

	body, _ := json.Marshal(reqBody)
	req := httptest.NewRequest("POST", "/api/execute", bytes.NewReader(body))
	req.Header.Set("Authorization", "Bearer "+generateValidTestJWT(t))
	w := httptest.NewRecorder()

	server.engine.ServeHTTP(w, req)

	assert.Equal(t, http.StatusBadRequest, w.Code)

	var response map[string]interface{}
	err = json.Unmarshal(w.Body.Bytes(), &response)
	require.NoError(t, err)

	assert.Equal(t, "command cannot be empty", response["error"])
	assert.Equal(t, float64(400), response["code"])
}

func TestExecuteCommandInvalidTimeout(t *testing.T) {

	server, err := NewServer(config)

	reqBody := ExecuteRequest{
		Command: []string{"echo", "test"},
		Timeout: "invalid",
	}

	body, _ := json.Marshal(reqBody)
	req := httptest.NewRequest("POST", "/api/execute", bytes.NewReader(body))
	req.Header.Set("Authorization", "Bearer "+generateValidTestJWT(t))
	w := httptest.NewRecorder()

	server.engine.ServeHTTP(w, req)

	assert.Equal(t, http.StatusBadRequest, w.Code)

	var response map[string]interface{}
	err = json.Unmarshal(w.Body.Bytes(), &response)
	require.NoError(t, err)

	assert.Contains(t, response["error"], "invalid timeout")
	assert.Equal(t, float64(400), response["code"])
}

func TestExecuteCommandTimeoutExceeded(t *testing.T) {
	gin.SetMode(gin.TestMode)

	req := httptest.NewRequest("POST", "/api/execute", bytes.NewReader(body))
	req.Header.Set("Authorization", "Bearer "+generateValidTestJWT(t))

	assert.Equal(t, http.StatusOK, w.Code)

	require.NoError(t, err)

	assert.Equal(t, TimeoutExitCode, response.ExitCode)

}

func TestExecuteCommandNonZeroExit(t *testing.T) {

	req.Header.Set("Authorization", "Bearer "+generateValidTestJWT(t))

func TestExecuteCommandWithWorkingDir(t *testing.T) {
	gin.SetMode(gin.TestMode)

	tempDir := t.TempDir()
	config := &Config{
		Port:      8080,
		Workspace: tempDir,
	}

	server, err := NewServer(config)
	require.NoError(t, err)

	testDir := filepath.Join(tempDir, "testdir")
	require.NoError(t, os.Mkdir(testDir, 0755))

	testFile := filepath.Join(testDir, "test.txt")
	require.NoError(t, os.WriteFile(testFile, []byte("test content"), 0644))

	reqBody := ExecuteRequest{
		Command:    []string{"cat", "test.txt"},
		WorkingDir: "testdir",
	}

	body, _ := json.Marshal(reqBody)
	req := httptest.NewRequest("POST", "/api/execute", bytes.NewReader(body))
	req.Header.Set("Authorization", "Bearer "+generateValidTestJWT(t))
	w := httptest.NewRecorder()

	server.engine.ServeHTTP(w, req)

	assert.Equal(t, http.StatusOK, w.Code)

	err = json.Unmarshal(w.Body.Bytes(), &response)
	require.NoError(t, err)

	assert.Equal(t, "test content", response.Stdout)
	assert.Equal(t, 0, response.ExitCode)
}

func TestExecuteCommandWithEnv(t *testing.T) {
	gin.SetMode(gin.TestMode)

	tempDir := t.TempDir()
	config := &Config{

	req.Header.Set("Authorization", "Bearer "+generateValidTestJWT(t))

func TestExecuteCommandMissingAuth(t *testing.T) {
	gin.SetMode(gin.TestMode)

func TestUploadFileMultipart(t *testing.T) {
	gin.SetMode(gin.TestMode)

	tempDir := t.TempDir()
	config := &Config{
		Port:      8080,
		Workspace: tempDir,
	}

	server, err := NewServer(config)
	require.NoError(t, err)

	body := &bytes.Buffer{}
	writer := multipart.NewWriter(body)

	part, err := writer.CreateFormFile("file", "test.txt")
	require.NoError(t, err)

	_, err = part.Write([]byte("test content"))
	require.NoError(t, err)

	writer.WriteField("path", "uploads/test.txt")
	writer.WriteField("mode", "0644")
	writer.Close()

	req := httptest.NewRequest("POST", "/api/files", body)
	req.Header.Set("Content-Type", writer.FormDataContentType())
	req.Header.Set("Authorization", "Bearer "+generateValidTestJWT(t))
	w := httptest.NewRecorder()

	server.engine.ServeHTTP(w, req)

	assert.Equal(t, http.StatusOK, w.Code)

	var response FileInfo
	err = json.Unmarshal(w.Body.Bytes(), &response)
	require.NoError(t, err)

	assert.Equal(t, "uploads/test.txt", response.Path)
	assert.Equal(t, int64(12), response.Size)
	assert.Equal(t, "0644", response.Mode)

	filePath := filepath.Join(tempDir, "uploads", "test.txt")
	content, err := os.ReadFile(filePath)
	require.NoError(t, err)
	assert.Equal(t, "test content", string(content))
}

func TestSanitizePath(t *testing.T) {
	tests := []struct {
		name        string
		workspace   string
		input       string
		expectError bool
	}{
		{
			name:      "valid relative path",
			workspace: "/tmp/workspace",
			input:     "subdir/file.txt",
		},
		{
			name:      "valid nested path",
			workspace: "/tmp/workspace",
			input:     "a/b/c/d/file.txt",
		},
		{
			name:        "path escape with ..",
			workspace:   "/tmp/workspace",
			input:       "../etc/passwd",
			expectError: true,
		},
		{
			name:        "absolute path escape",
			workspace:   "/tmp/workspace",
			input:       "/etc/passwd",
			expectError: true,
		},
	}

	for _, tt := range tests {
		t.Run(tt.name, func(t *testing.T) {
			workspace, err := filepath.Abs(tt.workspace)
			require.NoError(t, err)

			config := &Config{
				Port:      8080,
				Workspace: workspace,
			}

			server, err := NewServer(config)
			require.NoError(t, err)

			result, err := server.sanitizePath(tt.input)

			if tt.expectError {
				assert.Error(t, err)
			} else {
				assert.NoError(t, err)
				assert.True(t, strings.HasPrefix(result, workspace))
			}
		})
	}
}

func generateValidTestJWT(t *testing.T) string {
	t.Helper()

	privateKey, err := generateTestRSAKey()
	require.NoError(t, err)

	token := jwt.NewWithClaims(jwt.SigningMethodRS256, jwt.MapClaims{
		"sub": "test",
		"iat": time.Now().Unix(),
		"exp": time.Now().Add(time.Hour).Unix(),
	})

	tokenString, err := token.SignedString(privateKey)
	require.NoError(t, err)

	publicKey, err := generateTestPublicKeyFromPrivate(privateKey)
	require.NoError(t, err)

	os.Setenv("PICOD_AUTH_PUBLIC_KEY", publicKey)

	return tokenString
}

func generateTestRSAKey() (*rsa.PrivateKey, error) {
	return rsa.GenerateKey(rand.Reader, 2048)
}

func generateTestPublicKeyFromPrivate(privateKey *rsa.PrivateKey) (string, error) {
	publicKeyBytes, err := x509.MarshalPKIXPublicKey(&privateKey.PublicKey)
	if err != nil {
		return "", err
	}

	publicKeyPEM := pem.EncodeToMemory(&pem.Block{
		Type:  "PUBLIC KEY",
		Bytes: publicKeyBytes,
	})

	return string(publicKeyPEM), nil
}

func TestUploadFileMultipart(t *testing.T) {
	gin.SetMode(gin.TestMode)

	tempDir := t.TempDir()
	config := &Config{
		Port:      8080,
		Workspace: tempDir,
	}

	server, err := NewServer(config)
	require.NoError(t, err)

	body := &bytes.Buffer{}
	writer := multipart.NewWriter(body)

	part, err := writer.CreateFormFile("file", "test.txt")
	require.NoError(t, err)

	_, err = part.Write([]byte("test content"))
	require.NoError(t, err)

	writer.WriteField("path", "uploads/test.txt")
	writer.WriteField("mode", "0644")
	writer.Close()

	req := httptest.NewRequest("POST", "/api/files", body)
	req.Header.Set("Content-Type", writer.FormDataContentType())
	req.Header.Set("Authorization", "Bearer "+generateValidTestJWT(t))
	w := httptest.NewRecorder()

	server.engine.ServeHTTP(w, req)

	assert.Equal(t, http.StatusOK, w.Code)

	var response FileInfo
	err = json.Unmarshal(w.Body.Bytes(), &response)
	require.NoError(t, err)

	assert.Equal(t, "uploads/test.txt", response.Path)
	assert.Equal(t, int64(12), response.Size)
	assert.Equal(t, "0644", response.Mode)

	filePath := filepath.Join(tempDir, "uploads", "test.txt")
	content, err := os.ReadFile(filePath)
	require.NoError(t, err)
	assert.Equal(t, "test content", string(content))
}

func TestSanitizePath(t *testing.T) {
	tests := []struct {
		name        string
		workspace   string
		input       string
		expectError bool
	}{
		{
			name:      "valid relative path",
			workspace: "/tmp/workspace",
			input:     "subdir/file.txt",
		},
		{
			name:      "valid nested path",
			workspace: "/tmp/workspace",
			input:     "a/b/c/d/file.txt",
		},
		{
			name:        "path escape with ..",
			workspace:   "/tmp/workspace",
			input:       "../etc/passwd",
			expectError: true,
		},
		{
			name:        "absolute path escape",
			workspace:   "/tmp/workspace",
			input:       "/etc/passwd",
			expectError: true,
		},
	}

	for _, tt := range tests {
		t.Run(tt.name, func(t *testing.T) {
			workspace, err := filepath.Abs(tt.workspace)
			require.NoError(t, err)

			config := &Config{
				Port:      8080,
				Workspace: workspace,
			}

			server, err := NewServer(config)
			require.NoError(t, err)

			result, err := server.sanitizePath(tt.input)

			if tt.expectError {
				assert.Error(t, err)
			} else {
				assert.NoError(t, err)
				assert.True(t, strings.HasPrefix(result, workspace))
			}
		})
	}
}

func generateValidTestJWT(t *testing.T) string {
	t.Helper()

	privateKey, err := generateTestRSAKey()
	require.NoError(t, err)

	token := jwt.NewWithClaims(jwt.SigningMethodRS256, jwt.MapClaims{
		"sub": "test",
		"iat": time.Now().Unix(),
		"exp": time.Now().Add(time.Hour).Unix(),
	})

	tokenString, err := token.SignedString(privateKey)
	require.NoError(t, err)

	publicKey, err := generateTestPublicKeyFromPrivate(privateKey)
	require.NoError(t, err)

	os.Setenv("PICOD_AUTH_PUBLIC_KEY", publicKey)

	return tokenString
}

func generateTestRSAKey() (*rsa.PrivateKey, error) {
	return rsa.GenerateKey(rand.Reader, 2048)
}

func generateTestPublicKeyFromPrivate(privateKey *rsa.PrivateKey) (string, error) {
	publicKeyBytes, err := x509.MarshalPKIXPublicKey(&privateKey.PublicKey)
	if err != nil {
		return "", err
	}

	publicKeyPEM := pem.EncodeToMemory(&pem.Block{
		Type:  "PUBLIC KEY",
		Bytes: publicKeyBytes,
	})

	return string(publicKeyPEM), nil
}

func TestUploadFileMultipart(t *testing.T) {

	}

func TestSanitizePath(t *testing.T) {
	tests := []struct {
		name        string
		workspace   string
		input       string
		expectError bool
	}{
		{
			name:      "valid relative path",
			workspace: "/tmp/workspace",
			input:     "subdir/file.txt",
		},
		{
			name:      "valid nested path",
			workspace: "/tmp/workspace",
			input:     "a/b/c/d/file.txt",
		},
		{
			name:        "path escape with ..",
			workspace:   "/tmp/workspace",
			input:       "../etc/passwd",
			expectError: true,
		},
		{
			name:        "absolute path escape",
			workspace:   "/tmp/workspace",
			input:       "/etc/passwd",
			expectError: true,
		},
	}

	for _, tt := range tests {
		t.Run(tt.name, func(t *testing.T) {
			workspace, err := filepath.Abs(tt.workspace)
			require.NoError(t, err)

			config := &Config{
				Port:      8080,
				Workspace: workspace,
			}

			server, err := NewServer(config)
			require.NoError(t, err)

			result, err := server.sanitizePath(tt.input)

			if tt.expectError {
				assert.Error(t, err)
			} else {
				assert.NoError(t, err)
				assert.True(t, strings.HasPrefix(result, workspace))
			}
		})
	}
}

func setupTestPublicKey(t *testing.T) {
	t.Helper()

	privateKey, err := generateTestRSAKey()
	require.NoError(t, err)

	publicKey, err := generateTestPublicKeyFromPrivate(privateKey)
	require.NoError(t, err)

	os.Setenv("PICOD_AUTH_PUBLIC_KEY", publicKey)

	t.Cleanup(func() {
		os.Unsetenv("PICOD_AUTH_PUBLIC_KEY")
	})
}

func generateValidTestJWT(t *testing.T) string {
	t.Helper()

	privateKey, err := generateTestRSAKey()
	require.NoError(t, err)

	token := jwt.NewWithClaims(jwt.SigningMethodRS256, jwt.MapClaims{
		"sub": "test",
		"iat": time.Now().Unix(),
		"exp": time.Now().Add(time.Hour).Unix(),
	})

	tokenString, err := token.SignedString(privateKey)
	require.NoError(t, err)

	return tokenString
}

func generateTestRSAKey() (*rsa.PrivateKey, error) {
	return rsa.GenerateKey(rand.Reader, 2048)
}

func generateTestPublicKeyFromPrivate(privateKey *rsa.PrivateKey) (string, error) {
	publicKeyBytes, err := x509.MarshalPKIXPublicKey(&privateKey.PublicKey)
	if err != nil {
		return "", err
	}

	publicKeyPEM := pem.EncodeToMemory(&pem.Block{
		Type:  "PUBLIC KEY",
		Bytes: publicKeyBytes,
	})

	return string(publicKeyPEM), nil
}

func TestHealthEndpoint(t *testing.T) {

func TestUploadFileMultipart(t *testing.T) {
	setupTestPublicKey(t)
	gin.SetMode(gin.TestMode)

	tempDir := t.TempDir()
	config := &Config{
		Port:      8080,
		Workspace: tempDir,
	}

	server, err := NewServer(config)
	require.NoError(t, err)

	body := &bytes.Buffer{}
	writer := multipart.NewWriter(body)

	part, err := writer.CreateFormFile("file", "test.txt")
	require.NoError(t, err)

	_, err = part.Write([]byte("test content"))
	require.NoError(t, err)

	writer.WriteField("path", "uploads/test.txt")
	writer.WriteField("mode", "0644")
	writer.Close()

	req := httptest.NewRequest("POST", "/api/files", body)
	req.Header.Set("Content-Type", writer.FormDataContentType())
	req.Header.Set("Authorization", "Bearer "+generateValidTestJWT(t))
	w := httptest.NewRecorder()

	server.engine.ServeHTTP(w, req)

	assert.Equal(t, http.StatusOK, w.Code)

	var response FileInfo
	err = json.Unmarshal(w.Body.Bytes(), &response)
	require.NoError(t, err)

	assert.Equal(t, "uploads/test.txt", response.Path)
	assert.Equal(t, int64(12), response.Size)
	assert.Equal(t, "0644", response.Mode)

	filePath := filepath.Join(tempDir, "uploads", "test.txt")
	content, err := os.ReadFile(filePath)
	require.NoError(t, err)
	assert.Equal(t, "test content", string(content))
}

func TestSanitizePath(t *testing.T) {
	tests := []struct {
		name        string
		workspace   string
		input       string
		expectError bool
	}{
		{
			name:      "valid relative path",
			workspace: "/tmp/workspace",
			input:     "subdir/file.txt",
		},
		{
			name:      "valid nested path",
			workspace: "/tmp/workspace",
			input:     "a/b/c/d/file.txt",
		},
		{
			name:        "path escape with ..",
			workspace:   "/tmp/workspace",
			input:       "../etc/passwd",
			expectError: true,
		},
		{
			name:        "absolute path escape",
			workspace:   "/tmp/workspace",
			input:       "/etc/passwd",
			expectError: true,
		},
	}

	for _, tt := range tests {
		t.Run(tt.name, func(t *testing.T) {
			workspace, err := filepath.Abs(tt.workspace)
			require.NoError(t, err)

			config := &Config{
				Port:      8080,
				Workspace: workspace,
			}

			server, err := NewServer(config)
			require.NoError(t, err)

			result, err := server.sanitizePath(tt.input)

			if tt.expectError {
				assert.Error(t, err)
			} else {
				assert.NoError(t, err)
				assert.True(t, strings.HasPrefix(result, workspace))
			}
		})
	}
}

func setupTestPublicKey(t *testing.T) {
	t.Helper()

	privateKey, err := generateTestRSAKey()
	require.NoError(t, err)

	publicKey, err := generateTestPublicKeyFromPrivate(privateKey)
	require.NoError(t, err)

	os.Setenv("PICOD_AUTH_PUBLIC_KEY", publicKey)

	t.Cleanup(func() {
		os.Unsetenv("PICOD_AUTH_PUBLIC_KEY")
	})
}

func generateValidTestJWT(t *testing.T) string {
	t.Helper()

	privateKey, err := generateTestRSAKey()
	require.NoError(t, err)

	token := jwt.NewWithClaims(jwt.SigningMethodRS256, jwt.MapClaims{
		"sub": "test",
		"iat": time.Now().Unix(),
		"exp": time.Now().Add(time.Hour).Unix(),
	})

	tokenString, err := token.SignedString(privateKey)
	require.NoError(t, err)

	return tokenString
}

func generateTestRSAKey() (*rsa.PrivateKey, error) {
	return rsa.GenerateKey(rand.Reader, 2048)
}

func generateTestPublicKeyFromPrivate(privateKey *rsa.PrivateKey) (string, error) {
	publicKeyBytes, err := x509.MarshalPKIXPublicKey(&privateKey.PublicKey)
	if err != nil {
		return "", err
	}

	publicKeyPEM := pem.EncodeToMemory(&pem.Block{
		Type:  "PUBLIC KEY",
		Bytes: publicKeyBytes,
	})

	return string(publicKeyPEM), nil
}

func TestSanitizePath(t *testing.T) {
	tests := []struct {
		name        string
		workspace   string
		input       string
		expectError bool
	}{
		{
			name:      "valid relative path",
			workspace: "/tmp/workspace",
			input:     "subdir/file.txt",
		},
		{
			name:      "valid nested path",
			workspace: "/tmp/workspace",
			input:     "a/b/c/d/file.txt",
		},
		{
			name:        "path escape with ..",
			workspace:   "/tmp/workspace",
			input:       "../etc/passwd",
			expectError: true,
		},
		{
			name:        "absolute path escape",
			workspace:   "/tmp/workspace",
			input:       "/etc/passwd",
			expectError: true,
		},
	}

	for _, tt := range tests {
		t.Run(tt.name, func(t *testing.T) {
			workspace, err := filepath.Abs(tt.workspace)
			require.NoError(t, err)

			config := &Config{
				Port:      8080,
				Workspace: workspace,
			}

			server, err := NewServer(config)
			require.NoError(t, err)

			result, err := server.sanitizePath(tt.input)

			if tt.expectError {
				assert.Error(t, err)
			} else {
				assert.NoError(t, err)
				assert.True(t, strings.HasPrefix(result, workspace))
			}
		})
	}
}

func setupTestPublicKey(t *testing.T) {
	t.Helper()

	privateKey, err := generateTestRSAKey()
	require.NoError(t, err)

	publicKey, err := generateTestPublicKeyFromPrivate(privateKey)
	require.NoError(t, err)

	os.Setenv("PICOD_AUTH_PUBLIC_KEY", publicKey)

	t.Cleanup(func() {
		os.Unsetenv("PICOD_AUTH_PUBLIC_KEY")
	})
}

func generateValidTestJWT(t *testing.T) string {
	t.Helper()

	privateKey, err := generateTestRSAKey()
	require.NoError(t, err)

	token := jwt.NewWithClaims(jwt.SigningMethodRS256, jwt.MapClaims{
		"sub": "test",
		"iat": time.Now().Unix(),
		"exp": time.Now().Add(time.Hour).Unix(),
	})

	tokenString, err := token.SignedString(privateKey)
	require.NoError(t, err)

	return tokenString
}

func generateTestRSAKey() (*rsa.PrivateKey, error) {
	return rsa.GenerateKey(rand.Reader, 2048)
}

func generateTestPublicKeyFromPrivate(privateKey *rsa.PrivateKey) (string, error) {
	publicKeyBytes, err := x509.MarshalPKIXPublicKey(&privateKey.PublicKey)
	if err != nil {
		return "", err
	}

	publicKeyPEM := pem.EncodeToMemory(&pem.Block{
		Type:  "PUBLIC KEY",
		Bytes: publicKeyBytes,
	})

	return string(publicKeyPEM), nil
}

func TestSanitizePath(t *testing.T) {
	tests := []struct {
		name        string
		workspace   string
		input       string
		expectError bool
	}{
		{
			name:      "valid relative path",
			workspace: "/tmp/workspace",
			input:     "subdir/file.txt",
		},
		{
			name:      "valid nested path",
			workspace: "/tmp/workspace",
			input:     "a/b/c/d/file.txt",
		},
		{
			name:        "path escape with ..",
			workspace:   "/tmp/workspace",
			input:       "../etc/passwd",
			expectError: true,
		},
		{
			name:        "absolute path escape",
			workspace:   "/tmp/workspace",
			input:       "/etc/passwd",
			expectError: true,
		},
	}

	for _, tt := range tests {
		t.Run(tt.name, func(t *testing.T) {
			workspace, err := filepath.Abs(tt.workspace)
			require.NoError(t, err)

			config := &Config{
				Port:      8080,
				Workspace: workspace,
			}

			server, err := NewServer(config)
			require.NoError(t, err)

			result, err := server.sanitizePath(tt.input)

			if tt.expectError {
				assert.Error(t, err)
			} else {
				assert.NoError(t, err)
				assert.True(t, strings.HasPrefix(result, workspace))
			}
		})
	}
}

func setupTestPublicKey(t *testing.T) {
	t.Helper()

	privateKey, err := generateTestRSAKey()
	require.NoError(t, err)

	publicKey, err := generateTestPublicKeyFromPrivate(privateKey)
	require.NoError(t, err)

	os.Setenv("PICOD_AUTH_PUBLIC_KEY", publicKey)

	t.Cleanup(func() {
		os.Unsetenv("PICOD_AUTH_PUBLIC_KEY")
	})
}

func generateValidTestJWT(t *testing.T) string {
	t.Helper()

	privateKey, err := generateTestRSAKey()
	require.NoError(t, err)

	token := jwt.NewWithClaims(jwt.SigningMethodRS256, jwt.MapClaims{
		"sub": "test",
		"iat": time.Now().Unix(),
		"exp": time.Now().Add(time.Hour).Unix(),
	})

	tokenString, err := token.SignedString(privateKey)
	require.NoError(t, err)

	return tokenString
}

func generateTestRSAKey() (*rsa.PrivateKey, error) {
	return rsa.GenerateKey(rand.Reader, 2048)
}

func generateTestPublicKeyFromPrivate(privateKey *rsa.PrivateKey) (string, error) {
	publicKeyBytes, err := x509.MarshalPKIXPublicKey(&privateKey.PublicKey)
	if err != nil {
		return "", err
	}

	publicKeyPEM := pem.EncodeToMemory(&pem.Block{
		Type:  "PUBLIC KEY",
		Bytes: publicKeyBytes,
	})

	return string(publicKeyPEM), nil
}

	reqBody := ExecuteRequest{
		Command: []string{"echo", "test"},
	}

	body, _ := json.Marshal(reqBody)
	req := httptest.NewRequest("POST", "/api/execute", bytes.NewReader(body))
	w := httptest.NewRecorder()

	server.engine.ServeHTTP(w, req)

	assert.Equal(t, http.StatusUnauthorized, w.Code)

	var response map[string]interface{}
	err = json.Unmarshal(w.Body.Bytes(), &response)
	require.NoError(t, err)

	assert.Contains(t, response["error"], "Authorization")
	assert.Equal(t, float64(401), response["code"])
}

func TestUploadFileMultipart(t *testing.T) {
	setupTestPublicKey(t)
	gin.SetMode(gin.TestMode)

	tempDir := t.TempDir()
	config := &Config{
		Port:      8080,
		Workspace: tempDir,
	}

	server, err := NewServer(config)
	require.NoError(t, err)

	body := &bytes.Buffer{}
	writer := multipart.NewWriter(body)

	part, err := writer.CreateFormFile("file", "test.txt")
	require.NoError(t, err)

	_, err = part.Write([]byte("test content"))
	require.NoError(t, err)

	writer.WriteField("path", "uploads/test.txt")
	writer.WriteField("mode", "0644")
	writer.Close()

	req := httptest.NewRequest("POST", "/api/files", body)
	req.Header.Set("Content-Type", writer.FormDataContentType())
	req.Header.Set("Authorization", "Bearer "+generateValidTestJWT(t))
	w := httptest.NewRecorder()

	server.engine.ServeHTTP(w, req)

	assert.Equal(t, http.StatusOK, w.Code)

	var response FileInfo
	err = json.Unmarshal(w.Body.Bytes(), &response)
	require.NoError(t, err)

	assert.Equal(t, "uploads/test.txt", response.Path)
	assert.Equal(t, int64(12), response.Size)
	assert.Equal(t, "0644", response.Mode)

	filePath := filepath.Join(tempDir, "uploads", "test.txt")
	content, err := os.ReadFile(filePath)
	require.NoError(t, err)
	assert.Equal(t, "test content", string(content))
}

func TestUploadFileJSON(t *testing.T) {
	setupTestPublicKey(t)
	gin.SetMode(gin.TestMode)

	tempDir := t.TempDir()

		Port:      8080,

	}

		Content: base64.StdEncoding.EncodeToString([]byte("test content")),
		Mode:    "0644",
	}

	req.Header.Set("Content-Type", "application/json")
	req.Header.Set("Authorization", "Bearer "+generateValidTestJWT(t))
	w := httptest.NewRecorder()

	server.engine.ServeHTTP(w, req)

	assert.Equal(t, http.StatusOK, w.Code)

	var response FileInfo
	err = json.Unmarshal(w.Body.Bytes(), &response)
	require.NoError(t, err)

	assert.Equal(t, "uploads/test.txt", response.Path)

	filePath := filepath.Join(tempDir, "uploads", "test.txt")
	content, err := os.ReadFile(filePath)
	require.NoError(t, err)
	assert.Equal(t, "test content", string(content))
}

func TestListFiles(t *testing.T) {
	setupTestPublicKey(t)
	gin.SetMode(gin.TestMode)

	tempDir := t.TempDir()
	config := &Config{
		Port:      8080,
		Workspace: tempDir,
	}

	server, err := NewServer(config)
	require.NoError(t, err)

	testDir := filepath.Join(tempDir, "testdir")
	require.NoError(t, os.Mkdir(testDir, 0755))

	os.WriteFile(filepath.Join(testDir, "file1.txt"), []byte("content1"), 0644)
	os.WriteFile(filepath.Join(testDir, "file2.txt"), []byte("content2"), 0644)

	req := httptest.NewRequest("GET", "/api/files?path=testdir", nil)
	req.Header.Set("Authorization", "Bearer "+generateValidTestJWT(t))
	w := httptest.NewRecorder()

	server.engine.ServeHTTP(w, req)

	assert.Equal(t, http.StatusOK, w.Code)

	var response ListFilesResponse
	err = json.Unmarshal(w.Body.Bytes(), &response)
	require.NoError(t, err)

	assert.Len(t, response.Files, 2)

	fileNames := []string{response.Files[0].Name, response.Files[1].Name}
	assert.Contains(t, fileNames, "file1.txt")
	assert.Contains(t, fileNames, "file2.txt")
}

func TestListFilesMissingPath(t *testing.T) {
	setupTestPublicKey(t)
	gin.SetMode(gin.TestMode)

	tempDir := t.TempDir()

	req.Header.Set("Authorization", "Bearer "+generateValidTestJWT(t))
	w := httptest.NewRecorder()

	assert.Equal(t, http.StatusBadRequest, w.Code)

	var response map[string]interface{}
	err = json.Unmarshal(w.Body.Bytes(), &response)
	require.NoError(t, err)

	assert.Equal(t, "Missing 'path' query parameter", response["error"])
	assert.Equal(t, float64(400), response["code"])
}

func TestListFilesDirectoryNotFound(t *testing.T) {
	setupTestPublicKey(t)
	gin.SetMode(gin.TestMode)

	tempDir := t.TempDir()
	config := &Config{
		Port:      8080,
		Workspace: tempDir,
	}

	server, err := NewServer(config)
	require.NoError(t, err)

	assert.Equal(t, "Directory not found", response["error"])
	assert.Equal(t, float64(404), response["code"])
}

func TestDownloadFile(t *testing.T) {
	setupTestPublicKey(t)
	gin.SetMode(gin.TestMode)

	tempDir := t.TempDir()
	config := &Config{
		Port:      8080,
		Workspace: tempDir,
	}

	server, err := NewServer(config)
	require.NoError(t, err)

	testFile := filepath.Join(tempDir, "test.txt")
	require.NoError(t, os.WriteFile(testFile, []byte("test content"), 0644))

	req := httptest.NewRequest("GET", "/api/files/test.txt", nil)
	req.Header.Set("Authorization", "Bearer "+generateValidTestJWT(t))
	w := httptest.NewRecorder()

	server.engine.ServeHTTP(w, req)

	assert.Equal(t, http.StatusOK, w.Code)
	assert.Equal(t, "test content", w.Body.String())
	assert.Equal(t, "File Transfer", w.Header().Get("Content-Description"))
	assert.Equal(t, "binary", w.Header().Get("Content-Transfer-Encoding"))
	assert.Contains(t, w.Header().Get("Content-Disposition"), "test.txt")
}

func TestDownloadFileEscapesWorkspace(t *testing.T) {
	setupTestPublicKey(t)
	gin.SetMode(gin.TestMode)

	tempDir := t.TempDir()
	config := &Config{
		Port:      8080,
		Workspace: tempDir,
	}

	server, err := NewServer(config)
	require.NoError(t, err)

	req := httptest.NewRequest("GET", "/api/files/../escape.txt", nil)
	req.Header.Set("Authorization", "Bearer "+generateValidTestJWT(t))
	w := httptest.NewRecorder()

	server.engine.ServeHTTP(w, req)

	assert.Equal(t, http.StatusBadRequest, w.Code)

	var response map[string]interface{}
	err = json.Unmarshal(w.Body.Bytes(), &response)
	require.NoError(t, err)

	assert.Contains(t, response["error"], "denied")
}

func TestSanitizePath(t *testing.T) {
	tests := []struct {
		name        string
		workspace   string
		input       string
		expectError bool
	}{
		{
			name:      "valid relative path",
			workspace: "/tmp/workspace",
			input:     "subdir/file.txt",
		},
		{
			name:      "valid nested path",
			workspace: "/tmp/workspace",
			input:     "a/b/c/d/file.txt",
		},
		{
			name:        "path escape with ..",
			workspace:   "/tmp/workspace",
			input:       "../etc/passwd",
			expectError: true,
		},
		{
			name:        "absolute path escape",
			workspace:   "/tmp/workspace",
			input:       "/etc/passwd",
			expectError: true,
		},
	}

	for _, tt := range tests {
		t.Run(tt.name, func(t *testing.T) {
			workspace, err := filepath.Abs(tt.workspace)
			require.NoError(t, err)

			config := &Config{
				Port:      8080,
				Workspace: workspace,
			}

			server, err := NewServer(config)
			require.NoError(t, err)

			result, err := server.sanitizePath(tt.input)

			if tt.expectError {
				assert.Error(t, err)
			} else {
				assert.NoError(t, err)
				assert.True(t, strings.HasPrefix(result, workspace))
			}
		})
	}
}

func setupTestPublicKey(t *testing.T) {
	t.Helper()

	privateKey, err := generateTestRSAKey()
	require.NoError(t, err)

	publicKey, err := generateTestPublicKeyFromPrivate(privateKey)
	require.NoError(t, err)

	os.Setenv("PICOD_AUTH_PUBLIC_KEY", publicKey)

	t.Cleanup(func() {
		os.Unsetenv("PICOD_AUTH_PUBLIC_KEY")
	})
}

func generateValidTestJWT(t *testing.T) string {
	t.Helper()

	privateKey, err := generateTestRSAKey()
	require.NoError(t, err)

	token := jwt.NewWithClaims(jwt.SigningMethodRS256, jwt.MapClaims{
		"sub": "test",
		"iat": time.Now().Unix(),
		"exp": time.Now().Add(time.Hour).Unix(),
	})

	tokenString, err := token.SignedString(privateKey)
	require.NoError(t, err)

	return tokenString
}

func generateTestRSAKey() (*rsa.PrivateKey, error) {
	return rsa.GenerateKey(rand.Reader, 2048)
}

func generateTestPublicKeyFromPrivate(privateKey *rsa.PrivateKey) (string, error) {
	publicKeyBytes, err := x509.MarshalPKIXPublicKey(&privateKey.PublicKey)
	if err != nil {
		return "", err
	}

	publicKeyPEM := pem.EncodeToMemory(&pem.Block{
		Type:  "PUBLIC KEY",
		Bytes: publicKeyBytes,
	})

	return string(publicKeyPEM), nil
}

package picod

import (
	"bytes"
	"crypto/rand"
	"crypto/rsa"
	"crypto/x509"
	"encoding/base64"
	"encoding/json"
	"encoding/pem"

	"github.com/golang-jwt/jwt/v5"
	"github.com/stretchr/testify/assert"
	"github.com/stretchr/testify/require"
)

func TestHealthEndpoint(t *testing.T) {
	gin.SetMode(gin.TestMode)

	setupTestPublicKey(t)

	tempDir := t.TempDir()
	config := &Config{
		Port:      8080,
		Workspace: tempDir,
	}

	server, err := NewServer(config)
	require.NoError(t, err)

	req := httptest.NewRequest("GET", "/health", nil)
	w := httptest.NewRecorder()

	server.engine.ServeHTTP(w, req)

	assert.Equal(t, http.StatusOK, w.Code)

	var response map[string]interface{}
	err = json.Unmarshal(w.Body.Bytes(), &response)
	require.NoError(t, err)

	assert.Equal(t, "ok", response["status"])
	assert.Equal(t, "PicoD", response["service"])
	assert.Equal(t, "0.0.1", response["version"])
	assert.NotEmpty(t, response["uptime"])
}

func TestExecuteCommandValidRequest(t *testing.T) {
	setupTestPublicKey(t)
	gin.SetMode(gin.TestMode)

	tempDir := t.TempDir()
	config := &Config{
		Port:      8080,
		Workspace: tempDir,
	}

	server, err := NewServer(config)
	require.NoError(t, err)

	reqBody := ExecuteRequest{
		Command: []string{"echo", "hello world"},
	}

	body, _ := json.Marshal(reqBody)
	req := httptest.NewRequest("POST", "/api/execute", bytes.NewReader(body))
	req.Header.Set("Authorization", "Bearer "+generateValidTestJWT(t))
	w := httptest.NewRecorder()

	server.engine.ServeHTTP(w, req)

	assert.Equal(t, http.StatusOK, w.Code)

	var response ExecuteResponse
	err = json.Unmarshal(w.Body.Bytes(), &response)
	require.NoError(t, err)

	assert.Equal(t, "hello world\n", response.Stdout)
	assert.Equal(t, "", response.Stderr)
	assert.Equal(t, 0, response.ExitCode)
	assert.Greater(t, response.Duration, float64(0))
	assert.False(t, response.StartTime.IsZero())
	assert.False(t, response.EndTime.IsZero())
}

func TestExecuteCommandEmptyCommand(t *testing.T) {
	setupTestPublicKey(t)
	gin.SetMode(gin.TestMode)

	tempDir := t.TempDir()
	config := &Config{
		Port:      8080,
		Workspace: tempDir,
	}

	server, err := NewServer(config)
	require.NoError(t, err)

	reqBody := ExecuteRequest{
		Command: []string{},
	}

	body, _ := json.Marshal(reqBody)
	req := httptest.NewRequest("POST", "/api/execute", bytes.NewReader(body))
	req.Header.Set("Authorization", "Bearer "+generateValidTestJWT(t))

func TestSanitizePath(t *testing.T) {
	tests := []struct {
		name        string
		workspace   string
		input       string
		expectError bool
	}{
		{
			name:      "valid relative path",
			workspace: "/tmp/workspace",
			input:     "subdir/file.txt",
		},
		{
			name:      "valid nested path",
			workspace: "/tmp/workspace",
			input:     "a/b/c/d/file.txt",
		},
		{
			name:        "path escape with ..",
			workspace:   "/tmp/workspace",
			input:       "../etc/passwd",
			expectError: true,
		},
		{
			name:        "absolute path escape",
			workspace:   "/tmp/workspace",
			input:       "/etc/passwd",
			expectError: true,
		},
	}

	for _, tt := range tests {
		t.Run(tt.name, func(t *testing.T) {
			workspace, err := filepath.Abs(tt.workspace)
			require.NoError(t, err)

			config := &Config{
				Port:      8080,
				Workspace: workspace,
			}

			server, err := NewServer(config)
			require.NoError(t, err)

			result, err := server.sanitizePath(tt.input)

			if tt.expectError {
				assert.Error(t, err)
			} else {
				assert.NoError(t, err)
				assert.True(t, strings.HasPrefix(result, workspace))
			}
		})
	}
}

func setupTestPublicKey(t *testing.T) {
	t.Helper()

	privateKey, err := generateTestRSAKey()
	require.NoError(t, err)

	publicKey, err := generateTestPublicKeyFromPrivate(privateKey)
	require.NoError(t, err)

	os.Setenv("PICOD_AUTH_PUBLIC_KEY", publicKey)

	t.Cleanup(func() {
		os.Unsetenv("PICOD_AUTH_PUBLIC_KEY")
	})
}

func generateValidTestJWT(t *testing.T) string {
	t.Helper()

	privateKey, err := generateTestRSAKey()
	require.NoError(t, err)

	token := jwt.NewWithClaims(jwt.SigningMethodRS256, jwt.MapClaims{
		"sub": "test",
		"iat": time.Now().Unix(),
		"exp": time.Now().Add(time.Hour).Unix(),
	})

	tokenString, err := token.SignedString(privateKey)
	require.NoError(t, err)

	return tokenString
}

func generateTestRSAKey() (*rsa.PrivateKey, error) {
	return rsa.GenerateKey(rand.Reader, 2048)
}

func generateTestPublicKeyFromPrivate(privateKey *rsa.PrivateKey) (string, error) {
	publicKeyBytes, err := x509.MarshalPKIXPublicKey(&privateKey.PublicKey)
	if err != nil {
		return "", err
	}

	publicKeyPEM := pem.EncodeToMemory(&pem.Block{
		Type:  "PUBLIC KEY",
		Bytes: publicKeyBytes,
	})

	return string(publicKeyPEM), nil
}

func TestSanitizePath(t *testing.T) {
	tests := []struct {
		name        string
		workspace   string
		input       string
		expectError bool
	}{
		{
			name:      "valid relative path",
			workspace: "/tmp/workspace",
			input:     "subdir/file.txt",
		},
		{
			name:      "valid nested path",
			workspace: "/tmp/workspace",
			input:     "a/b/c/d/file.txt",
		},
		{
			name:        "path escape with ..",
			workspace:   "/tmp/workspace",
			input:       "../etc/passwd",
			expectError: true,
		},
		{
			name:        "absolute path escape",
			workspace:   "/tmp/workspace",
			input:       "/etc/passwd",
			expectError: true,
		},
	}

	for _, tt := range tests {
		t.Run(tt.name, func(t *testing.T) {
			workspace, err := filepath.Abs(tt.workspace)
			require.NoError(t, err)

			config := &Config{
				Port:      8080,
				Workspace: workspace,
			}

			server, err := NewServer(config)
			require.NoError(t, err)

			result, err := server.sanitizePath(tt.input)

			if tt.expectError {
				assert.Error(t, err)
			} else {
				assert.NoError(t, err)
				assert.True(t, strings.HasPrefix(result, workspace))
			}
		})
	}
}

var (
	testPrivateKey *rsa.PrivateKey
	testPublicKey  string
)

func setupTestPublicKey(t *testing.T) {
	t.Helper()

	if testPrivateKey == nil {
		privateKey, err := generateTestRSAKey()
		require.NoError(t, err)
		testPrivateKey = privateKey

		publicKey, err := generateTestPublicKeyFromPrivate(privateKey)
		require.NoError(t, err)
		testPublicKey = publicKey
	}

	os.Setenv("PICOD_AUTH_PUBLIC_KEY", testPublicKey)

	t.Cleanup(func() {
		os.Unsetenv("PICOD_AUTH_PUBLIC_KEY")
	})
}

func generateValidTestJWT(t *testing.T) string {
	t.Helper()

	if testPrivateKey == nil {
		privateKey, err := generateTestRSAKey()
		require.NoError(t, err)
		testPrivateKey = privateKey

		publicKey, err := generateTestPublicKeyFromPrivate(privateKey)
		require.NoError(t, err)
		testPublicKey = publicKey
	}

	token := jwt.NewWithClaims(jwt.SigningMethodRS256, jwt.MapClaims{
		"sub": "test",
		"iat": time.Now().Unix(),
		"exp": time.Now().Add(time.Hour).Unix(),
	})

	tokenString, err := token.SignedString(testPrivateKey)
	require.NoError(t, err)

	return tokenString
}

func generateTestRSAKey() (*rsa.PrivateKey, error) {
	return rsa.GenerateKey(rand.Reader, 2048)
}

func generateTestPublicKeyFromPrivate(privateKey *rsa.PrivateKey) (string, error) {
	publicKeyBytes, err := x509.MarshalPKIXPublicKey(&privateKey.PublicKey)
	if err != nil {
		return "", err
	}

	publicKeyPEM := pem.EncodeToMemory(&pem.Block{
		Type:  "PUBLIC KEY",
		Bytes: publicKeyBytes,
	})

	return string(publicKeyPEM), nil
}

func TestExecuteCommandValidRequest(t *testing.T) {

		Port:      8080,
		Workspace: tempDir,
	}

	reqBody := ExecuteRequest{

	}

	body, _ := json.Marshal(reqBody)
	req := httptest.NewRequest("POST", "/api/execute", bytes.NewReader(body))
	req.Header.Set("Authorization", "Bearer "+generateValidTestJWT(t))

func TestSanitizePath(t *testing.T) {
	tests := []struct {
		name        string
		workspace   string
		input       string
		expectError bool
	}{
		{
			name:      "valid relative path",
			workspace: "/tmp/workspace",
			input:     "subdir/file.txt",
		},
		{
			name:      "valid nested path",
			workspace: "/tmp/workspace",
			input:     "a/b/c/d/file.txt",
		},
		{
			name:        "path escape with ..",
			workspace:   "/tmp/workspace",
			input:       "../etc/passwd",
			expectError: true,
		},
		{
			name:        "absolute path escape",
			workspace:   "/tmp/workspace",
			input:       "/etc/passwd",
			expectError: true,
		},
	}

	for _, tt := range tests {
		t.Run(tt.name, func(t *testing.T) {
			workspace, err := filepath.Abs(tt.workspace)
			require.NoError(t, err)

			config := &Config{
				Port:      8080,
				Workspace: workspace,
			}

			server, err := NewServer(config)
			require.NoError(t, err)

			result, err := server.sanitizePath(tt.input)

			if tt.expectError {
				assert.Error(t, err)
			} else {
				assert.NoError(t, err)
				assert.True(t, strings.HasPrefix(result, workspace))
			}
		})
	}
}

var (
	testPrivateKey *rsa.PrivateKey
	testPublicKey  string
)

func setupTestPublicKey(t *testing.T) {
	t.Helper()

	if testPrivateKey == nil {
		privateKey, err := generateTestRSAKey()
		require.NoError(t, err)
		testPrivateKey = privateKey

		publicKey, err := generateTestPublicKeyFromPrivate(privateKey)
		require.NoError(t, err)
		testPublicKey = publicKey
	}

	os.Setenv("PICOD_AUTH_PUBLIC_KEY", testPublicKey)

	t.Cleanup(func() {
		os.Unsetenv("PICOD_AUTH_PUBLIC_KEY")
	})
}

func generateValidTestJWT(t *testing.T) string {
	t.Helper()

	if testPrivateKey == nil {
		privateKey, err := generateTestRSAKey()
		require.NoError(t, err)
		testPrivateKey = privateKey

		publicKey, err := generateTestPublicKeyFromPrivate(privateKey)
		require.NoError(t, err)
		testPublicKey = publicKey
	}

	token := jwt.NewWithClaims(jwt.SigningMethodRS256, jwt.MapClaims{
		"sub": "test",
		"iat": time.Now().Unix(),
		"exp": time.Now().Add(time.Hour).Unix(),
	})

	tokenString, err := token.SignedString(testPrivateKey)
	require.NoError(t, err)

	return tokenString
}

func generateTestRSAKey() (*rsa.PrivateKey, error) {
	return rsa.GenerateKey(rand.Reader, 2048)
}

func generateTestPublicKeyFromPrivate(privateKey *rsa.PrivateKey) (string, error) {
	publicKeyBytes, err := x509.MarshalPKIXPublicKey(&privateKey.PublicKey)
	if err != nil {
		return "", err
	}

	publicKeyPEM := pem.EncodeToMemory(&pem.Block{
		Type:  "PUBLIC KEY",
		Bytes: publicKeyBytes,
	})

	return string(publicKeyPEM), nil
}

func TestSanitizePath(t *testing.T) {
	setupTestPublicKey(t)

	tests := []struct {
		name        string
		workspace   string
		input       string
		expectError bool
	}{
		{
			name:      "valid relative path",
			workspace: "/tmp/workspace",
			input:     "subdir/file.txt",
		},
		{
			name:      "valid nested path",
			workspace: "/tmp/workspace",
			input:     "a/b/c/d/file.txt",
		},
		{
			name:        "path escape with ..",
			workspace:   "/tmp/workspace",
			input:       "../etc/passwd",
			expectError: true,
		},
		{
			name:        "absolute path escape",
			workspace:   "/tmp/workspace",
			input:       "/etc/passwd",
			expectError: true,
		},
	}

	for _, tt := range tests {
		t.Run(tt.name, func(t *testing.T) {
			workspace, err := filepath.Abs(tt.workspace)
			require.NoError(t, err)

			config := &Config{
				Port:      8080,
				Workspace: workspace,
			}

			server, err := NewServer(config)
			require.NoError(t, err)

			result, err := server.sanitizePath(tt.input)

			if tt.expectError {
				assert.Error(t, err)
			} else {
				assert.NoError(t, err)
				assert.True(t, strings.HasPrefix(result, workspace))
			}
		})
	}
}

var (
	testPrivateKey *rsa.PrivateKey
	testPublicKey  string
)

func setupTestPublicKey(t *testing.T) {
	t.Helper()

	if testPrivateKey == nil {
		privateKey, err := generateTestRSAKey()
		require.NoError(t, err)
		testPrivateKey = privateKey

		publicKey, err := generateTestPublicKeyFromPrivate(privateKey)
		require.NoError(t, err)
		testPublicKey = publicKey
	}

	os.Setenv("PICOD_AUTH_PUBLIC_KEY", testPublicKey)

	t.Cleanup(func() {
		os.Unsetenv("PICOD_AUTH_PUBLIC_KEY")
	})
}

func generateValidTestJWT(t *testing.T) string {
	t.Helper()

	if testPrivateKey == nil {
		privateKey, err := generateTestRSAKey()
		require.NoError(t, err)
		testPrivateKey = privateKey

		publicKey, err := generateTestPublicKeyFromPrivate(privateKey)
		require.NoError(t, err)
		testPublicKey = publicKey
	}

	token := jwt.NewWithClaims(jwt.SigningMethodRS256, jwt.MapClaims{
		"sub": "test",
		"iat": time.Now().Unix(),
		"exp": time.Now().Add(time.Hour).Unix(),
	})

	tokenString, err := token.SignedString(testPrivateKey)
	require.NoError(t, err)

	return tokenString
}

func generateTestRSAKey() (*rsa.PrivateKey, error) {
	return rsa.GenerateKey(rand.Reader, 2048)
}

func generateTestPublicKeyFromPrivate(privateKey *rsa.PrivateKey) (string, error) {
	publicKeyBytes, err := x509.MarshalPKIXPublicKey(&privateKey.PublicKey)
	if err != nil {
		return "", err
	}

	publicKeyPEM := pem.EncodeToMemory(&pem.Block{
		Type:  "PUBLIC KEY",
		Bytes: publicKeyBytes,
	})

	return string(publicKeyPEM), nil
}

func TestSanitizePath(t *testing.T) {
	setupTestPublicKey(t)

	tests := []struct {
		name        string
		workspace   string
		input       string
		expectError bool
	}{
		{
			name:      "valid relative path",
			workspace: "/tmp/workspace",
			input:     "subdir/file.txt",
		},
		{
			name:      "valid nested path",
			workspace: "/tmp/workspace",
			input:     "a/b/c/d/file.txt",
		},
		{
			name:        "path escape with ..",
			workspace:   "/tmp/workspace",
			input:       "../etc/passwd",
			expectError: true,
		},
		{
			name:        "absolute path escape",
			workspace:   "/tmp/workspace",
			input:       "/etc/passwd",
			expectError: true,
		},
	}

	for _, tt := range tests {
		t.Run(tt.name, func(t *testing.T) {
			workspace, err := filepath.Abs(tt.workspace)
			require.NoError(t, err)

			config := &Config{
				Port:      8080,
				Workspace: workspace,
			}

			server, err := NewServer(config)
			require.NoError(t, err)

			result, err := server.sanitizePath(tt.input)

			if tt.expectError {
				assert.Error(t, err)
			} else {
				assert.NoError(t, err)
				assert.True(t, strings.HasPrefix(result, workspace))
			}
		})
	}
}

var (
	testPrivateKey *rsa.PrivateKey
	testPublicKey  string
)

func setupTestPublicKey(t *testing.T) {
	t.Helper()

	if testPrivateKey == nil {
		privateKey, err := generateTestRSAKey()
		require.NoError(t, err)
		testPrivateKey = privateKey

		publicKey, err := generateTestPublicKeyFromPrivate(privateKey)
		require.NoError(t, err)
		testPublicKey = publicKey
	}

	os.Setenv("PICOD_AUTH_PUBLIC_KEY", testPublicKey)

	t.Cleanup(func() {
		os.Unsetenv("PICOD_AUTH_PUBLIC_KEY")
	})
}

func generateValidTestJWT(t *testing.T) string {
	t.Helper()

	if testPrivateKey == nil {
		privateKey, err := generateTestRSAKey()
		require.NoError(t, err)
		testPrivateKey = privateKey

		publicKey, err := generateTestPublicKeyFromPrivate(privateKey)
		require.NoError(t, err)
		testPublicKey = publicKey
	}

	token := jwt.NewWithClaims(jwt.SigningMethodRS256, jwt.MapClaims{
		"sub": "test",
		"iat": time.Now().Unix(),
		"exp": time.Now().Add(time.Hour).Unix(),
	})

	tokenString, err := token.SignedString(testPrivateKey)
	require.NoError(t, err)

	return tokenString
}

func generateTestRSAKey() (*rsa.PrivateKey, error) {
	return rsa.GenerateKey(rand.Reader, 2048)
}

func generateTestPublicKeyFromPrivate(privateKey *rsa.PrivateKey) (string, error) {
	publicKeyBytes, err := x509.MarshalPKIXPublicKey(&privateKey.PublicKey)
	if err != nil {
		return "", err
	}

	publicKeyPEM := pem.EncodeToMemory(&pem.Block{
		Type:  "PUBLIC KEY",
		Bytes: publicKeyBytes,
	})

	return string(publicKeyPEM), nil
}

func TestUploadFileMultipart(t *testing.T) {
	setupTestPublicKey(t)

		Workspace: tempDir,

	_, err = part.Write([]byte("test content"))
	require.NoError(t, err)

	writer.WriteField("path", "uploads/test.txt")
	writer.WriteField("mode", "0644")
	writer.Close()

	req := httptest.NewRequest("POST", "/api/files", body)
	req.Header.Set("Content-Type", writer.FormDataContentType())
	req.Header.Set("Authorization", "Bearer "+generateValidTestJWT(t))

	server.engine.ServeHTTP(w, req)

	assert.Equal(t, http.StatusOK, w.Code)

	require.NoError(t, err)

	assert.Equal(t, "uploads/test.txt", response.Path)
	assert.Equal(t, int64(12), response.Size)
	assert.Equal(t, "0644", response.Mode)

	filePath := filepath.Join(tempDir, "uploads", "test.txt")
	content, err := os.ReadFile(filePath)
	require.NoError(t, err)
	assert.Equal(t, "test content", string(content))
}

func TestSanitizePath(t *testing.T) {
	setupTestPublicKey(t)

	tests := []struct {
		name        string
		workspace   string
		input       string
		expectError bool
	}{
		{
			name:      "valid relative path",
			workspace: "/tmp/workspace",
			input:     "subdir/file.txt",
		},
		{
			name:      "valid nested path",
			workspace: "/tmp/workspace",
			input:     "a/b/c/d/file.txt",
		},
		{
			name:        "path escape with ..",
			workspace:   "/tmp/workspace",
			input:       "../etc/passwd",
			expectError: true,
		},
		{
			name:      "absolute path",
			workspace: "/tmp/workspace",
			input:     "/etc/passwd",
		},
	}

	for _, tt := range tests {
		t.Run(tt.name, func(t *testing.T) {
			workspace, err := filepath.Abs(tt.workspace)
			require.NoError(t, err)

			config := &Config{
				Port:      8080,
				Workspace: workspace,
			}

			server, err := NewServer(config)
			require.NoError(t, err)

			result, err := server.sanitizePath(tt.input)

			if tt.expectError {
				assert.Error(t, err)
			} else {
				assert.NoError(t, err)
				assert.True(t, strings.HasPrefix(result, workspace))
			}
		})
	}
}

var (
	testPrivateKey *rsa.PrivateKey
	testPublicKey  string
)

func setupTestPublicKey(t *testing.T) {
	t.Helper()

	if testPrivateKey == nil {
		privateKey, err := generateTestRSAKey()
		require.NoError(t, err)
		testPrivateKey = privateKey

		publicKey, err := generateTestPublicKeyFromPrivate(privateKey)
		require.NoError(t, err)
		testPublicKey = publicKey
	}

	os.Setenv("PICOD_AUTH_PUBLIC_KEY", testPublicKey)

	t.Cleanup(func() {
		os.Unsetenv("PICOD_AUTH_PUBLIC_KEY")
	})
}

func generateValidTestJWT(t *testing.T) string {
	t.Helper()

	if testPrivateKey == nil {
		privateKey, err := generateTestRSAKey()
		require.NoError(t, err)
		testPrivateKey = privateKey

		publicKey, err := generateTestPublicKeyFromPrivate(privateKey)
		require.NoError(t, err)
		testPublicKey = publicKey
	}

	token := jwt.NewWithClaims(jwt.SigningMethodRS256, jwt.MapClaims{
		"sub": "test",
		"iat": time.Now().Unix(),
		"exp": time.Now().Add(time.Hour).Unix(),
	})

	tokenString, err := token.SignedString(testPrivateKey)
	require.NoError(t, err)

	return tokenString
}

func generateTestRSAKey() (*rsa.PrivateKey, error) {
	return rsa.GenerateKey(rand.Reader, 2048)
}

func generateTestPublicKeyFromPrivate(privateKey *rsa.PrivateKey) (string, error) {
	publicKeyBytes, err := x509.MarshalPKIXPublicKey(&privateKey.PublicKey)
	if err != nil {
		return "", err
	}

	publicKeyPEM := pem.EncodeToMemory(&pem.Block{
		Type:  "PUBLIC KEY",
		Bytes: publicKeyBytes,
	})

	return string(publicKeyPEM), nil
}
